title: Updating Apps
drDigitalIntro: App updates bring improvements: new features, bug fixes, and security patches. It's important to keep apps updated, especially for security. Most devices can update apps automatically — you won't need to do anything. Or you can update manually from the App Store. Updates are free if the app was free. Always keep your apps and your device's operating system updated for the best security.

steps.say: Click 'My Apps' to see your installed apps.
WeatherNow has an update available — click Update next to it.

drDigitalSuccess: You updated an app! Keeping apps updated protects you from security vulnerabilities.
drDigitalHint: Go to My Apps and look for apps with an Update button next to them.
